name: em-sdd
description: Spec-Driven Development (SDD) workflow orchestrator. Walks a feature through create-spec → create-plan → verify-plan → implement → check → verify, tracking progress in sdd.yaml. Each step is also usable standalone via /em-sdd:sdd.<step>. Includes /em-sdd:sdd.status and /em-sdd:sdd.update-spec for inspection and spec changes.
